overview: Sage Hormone Health provides hormone management, medical weight loss, and physical health assessments delivered through both telehealth and in-person care. The practice focuses on accessible, evidence-based treatment for menopause symptoms, hormone optimization, and chronic health management.
highlights: Telehealth and in-person services for patients in-state, out-of-state, and internationally
Medical weight loss with peptides (Semaglutide, Tirzepatide, Sermorelin)
Cash-pay model eliminates insurance delays and coverage confirmation
targetAudience: Women managing menopause or perimenopause symptoms, men seeking hormone optimization, and people interested in medically supervised weight loss.
